nasb.text: unless, when we come into the land, you tie this cord of scarlet thread in the window through which you let us down, and gather to yourself into the house your father and your mother and your brothers and all your father’s household.

esv.text: Behold, when we come into the land, you shall tie this scarlet cord in the window through which you let us down, and you shall gather into your house your father and mother, your brothers, and all your father’s household.

cnv.text: 你要留意，我們再到這地方的時候，你要把這條朱紅色線繫在你縋我們下去的窗戶上；你也要把你的父母、兄弟和你父的全家，都聚集在你的屋裡。

ccb.text: 我们来攻占这座城的时候，你要把这条朱红色的绳子系在缒我们下去的窗户上，并且把你的父母、兄弟、姊妹和他们的亲人都召集到你家里。
